reasoning: Based on the provided search summary, it has been conclusively reported by May 2025 and reaffirmed in November 2025 that Rockstar Games delayed the release of 'Grand Theft Auto VI' entirely out of the 2025 calendar year. Consequently, it is virtually impossible for the game to be sold via standard authorized distribution channels in Europe within 2025.
